text_list: Eintracht Frankfurt have now reached a full agreement with VfL Bochum for Cajetan Lenz, with the transfer package expected to land in the €10-15 million range including add-ons. The 19-year-old midfielder is still projected to join Frankfurt in the summer window after final contract details were completed.

Tottenham Hotspur received further medical clarification on Lucas Bergvall after his ankle injury against Borussia Dortmund, and the internal expectation remains that he will miss multiple weeks. Thomas Frank indicated the recovery timeline is still being monitored, while Bergvall's recent fitness issues continue to influence squad planning.

Juventus advanced negotiations for Sevilla full-back Juanlu Sánchez and are discussing a structured deal that could include performance-based bonuses. The Serie A side still view him as a priority option to strengthen the right side if Pierre Kalulu's status remains uncertain.

Olympique Marseille are preparing an integration plan for Quinten Timber after confirming his long-term contract, with the midfielder expected to be introduced gradually in the next run of league fixtures. Club staff are optimistic his profile adds control and ball progression in central areas.

Newcastle United have opened talks to sign Sporting CP winger Francisco Trincão ahead of the next transfer window, with preliminary discussions focused on valuation and salary structure. No agreement has been finalized, but the player is described as a serious attacking target.

Inter Miami are finalizing a deal to appoint a new sporting director after several weeks of internal interviews, with the preferred candidate expected to take over recruitment operations before the summer market. The appointment is unrelated to current European transfer stories and would mark a new leadership setup at the club.

Eintracht Frankfurt's move for Cajetan Lenz has now been publicly described as finalized by multiple local outlets, with signatures completed and only registration timing left. Earlier reports framed the transfer as active talks, but club-side communication now points to a completed agreement.

Chelsea remain in contact with Rennes over Jérémy Jacquet, but no formal bid matching Rennes' valuation has been accepted so far. Sources close to the talks describe the situation as ongoing rather than settled, while alternative centre-back options remain under review.

Napoli have intensified discussions for Giovane Nascimento and are now considered favorites to close the deal after improving financial terms. Lazio continue to monitor the situation, but Napoli's package is currently viewed as the strongest path to completion.

Fulham reopened contract discussions with Harry Wilson after a period of stalled negotiations, with both parties now aiming to agree on extension length before the end of the campaign. Interest from other Premier League clubs remains, but the latest update points to renewed progress in London.

Atletico Madrid are evaluating a summer move for Real Sociedad midfielder Brais Méndez, with internal scouting reports highlighting his ball retention under pressure. The player is not currently linked to the existing transfer clusters and this would represent a separate storyline.

MLS side LA Galaxy have entered advanced talks with a Ligue 1 club for a young attacking midfielder, with personal terms reportedly close and a loan-to-buy structure under discussion. The negotiations are progressing independently from the European stories already in the dataset.
